title: [體育快訊]The last of us 2 第二週銷售量小鳥式下跌80%

replies.msg:
A series of ultra-cheap 3DS games have made a surprising re-entry in the UK charts, as physical sales for The Last Of Us Part 2 drop by 80%.
The more high profile a game is the more its sales tended to be front-loaded, so an 80% drop for The Last Of Us Part 2, in its second week, isn’t as unusual as it might sound. Especially as Uncharted 4 dropped by 78% in its second week, back in 2016.



https://metro.co.uk/2020/06/29/last-us-2-almost-beaten-3ds-game-uk-top-10-games-charts-20-june-12916439/
